ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "_id_" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data point */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Flags indicating the type of performance data */,
  "sourceLocatorId" INTEGER /* Reference to the source locator ID */,
  "correlationId" INTEGER /* Reference to the correlation ID */,
  "functionId" INTEGER /* Reference to the function ID */,
  "latencySamples" INTEGER /* Latency samples collected */,
  "samples" INTEGER /* Total samples collected */,
  "stallReason" INTEGER /* Stall reason code */,
  "pcOffset" INTEGER /* PC offset value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source ID */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application or service ID */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application or service */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("_id_"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_sourceLocatorId FOREIGN KEY ("sourceLocatorId") REFERENCES source_locators ("sourceLocatorId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_functionId FOREIGN KEY ("functionId") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_correlationId FOREIGN KEY ("correlationId") REFERENCES correlation_ids ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., log, metric, tracing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application or service ID */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the data source is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application or service ID */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the function was updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_ids" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation ID */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the correlation ID */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source ID */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the correlation ID was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_locators" (
  "sourceLocatorId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source locator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source locator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source ID */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the source locator was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sourceLocatorId")
)

CREATE TABLE "latency_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each latency sample */,
  "performance_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance data ID */,
  "latency_value" REAL /* Latency value collected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the latency sample was collected */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_latency_samples_performance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("_id_")
)

CREATE TABLE "stall_reasons" (
  "stall_reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stall reason */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stall reason */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the stall reason was updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stall_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pc_offsets" (
  "pc_offset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PC offset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PC offset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the PC offset was updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pc_offset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, engineer, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("_id_"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "performance_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data used to generate the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the report was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_performance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("_id_")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_settings" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI */,
  "kpi_description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the KPI */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application or service ID */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the KPI was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_values" (
  "kpi_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI value */,
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KPI */,
  "performance_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data used to calculate the KPI value */,
  "kpi_value" REAL /* Calculated KPI value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the KPI value was calculated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional metadata or tags */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the KPI value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_kpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("kpi_id") REFERENCES kpi_settings ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_performance_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_data_id") REFERENCES performance_data ("_id_")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "kpi_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KPI value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold exceeded) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_kpi_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("kpi_value_id") REFERENCES kpi_values ("kpi_value_id")
)
